rationale: Exercises all four skills: recalls LoRA/FL, analyzes 256KB RAM constraint, designs full federated architecture, and quantifies weight/adapter/throughput numbers.
Recall of PCIe Gen4 specs, analyze serverless LLM constraints, design layer-streaming zero-copy architecture, quantify 14GB/32GBs transfer and cold-start math.
Diagnoses SDC detection gap, designs interleaved test-vector telemetry framework, quantifies H100 TFLOPS/IB overhead; four-skill compound.
Recalls TP/Megatron, analyzes 100k context OOM, designs ring-self-attention sequence parallelism, quantifies activation memory per GPU.
Diagnoses link-flap failure mode, designs SDN topology-aware AllReduce with micro-chunking, quantifies 100GB sync + 10ms flap cost.
Recalls HBM3/L2 specs, analyzes sparse access inefficiency, designs AOT PGO compiler loop, quantifies 500GB/s vs 3TB/s bandwidth gain.
Analyzes mixed-fleet straggler cost, designs asymmetric ASGD scheduler, quantifies TFLOPS/price/TP configs for H100+V100.
Diagnoses P99 sources, designs eBPF+CUDA tracing framework, quantifies NCCL sync/P99 latency implications across TP=8.
Analyzes activation memory profile, designs selective recomputation by compute intensity, quantifies VRAM saved on 3D parallelism.
Analyzes T4 bandwidth limits, designs continuous-batching PP=2 with INT8, quantifies KV cache + PCIe transfer hiding.
Designs COW PagedAttention KV cache, quantifies 1.6GB shared vs 80GB per-user; combines analysis and architecture.
Designs preemption-resilient KV cache migration with async snapshotting; quantifies 1MB/30us PCIe + 20ms hydration.
Analyzes heterogeneous cluster stragglers, designs load-imbalanced PP with dynamic micro-batching, quantifies layer distribution by TFLOPS.
Analyzes 10x traffic swing, designs two-tier spot/reserved routing, quantifies T4 capacity and fleet scale.
Designs three-component distillation loss with adapters, quantifies teacher/student FLOPS gap, recalls KD/feature matching.
Content is thin (math is a single training-schedule calculation, no architectural design detail beyond NAS reference); design@L6+ defensible.
Recalls EAGLE mechanism, analyzes why hidden states outperform embeddings, designs draft head architecture, quantifies params/FLOPS/alpha/speedup in detail.
Recalls CUDA/ROCm/XLA, analyzes abstraction level tradeoffs, designs three-tier dispatch, quantifies per-op overhead vs budget.
Primarily design+quantification of CI/CD tiers with concrete cost math; less diagnostic/analytic content than mastery pattern.
Diagnoses A2A dominance, designs inter-layer pipeline overlap with double-buffering, quantifies 14ms->8ms/layer and 1.71x speedup precisely.
Analyzes draft/verify overlap, designs pipelined speculation with state mitigation, quantifies 50ms->30ms batch + 1.67x speedup.
Full carbon accounting: recalls grid intensity, analyzes pause-restart tradeoff, designs adaptive scheduler, quantifies 965 vs 97 tCO2 with multiple decisions.
Diagnoses memory-swap cause (not TOPS), designs hierarchical scheduler with guarantees/preemption/admission, quantifies sustained+burst TOPS and memory budget.
Diagnoses fleet-wide gradual degradation (sensor aging), designs aggregate-statistics detection, quantifies SNR for individual vs fleet + ROI.
Analyzes 5G latency marketing, designs Sidelink vs cellular architecture, quantifies full latency chain and stopping-distance implications.
Diagnoses calibration drift impact, designs continuous online calibration, quantifies offset at range and compute/downtime savings.
Designs three-tier fleet calibration (monitoring/correction/gating), quantifies bandwidth/compute/cost replacement with ROI.
Designs multi-layer EKF/Factor-Graph self-calibration for 5yr operation, analyzes IMU/camera drift, quantifies error accumulation numerically.
Designs multi-stage ULP architecture (MCU+PIR+NPU+harvest), quantifies 57uA budget for 5-yr battery life.
Designs holistic power-aware adaptive system with model zoo/predictive scheduler/hierarchical perception; quantifies Wh budget across states.
Solves energy balance equation with multiple power states, designs solar+battery sizing, quantifies 253k inferences/day with reserve.
Diagnoses USB3.0 harmonic EMC failure, designs common-mode choke fix, quantifies 8dB/18dB attenuation and BOM/respin cost savings.
Diagnoses FFC/radiometric drift in FLIR Lepton, designs blackbody recalibration, quantifies thermal contrast at range and detection probability.
Designs multi-level power scheduler with battery reserve priority, and crucially reveals counterintuitive accuracy-per-watt math; all four skills.
Analyzes ViT vs Orin Ridge Point mismatch, designs architecture strategy, quantifies AI/memory-bound behavior at 60W TDP.
Proves naive ViT infeasible with math (1.61T FLOPs / 26TOPS = 62s), designs cascaded CNN+ViT for 10ms budget.
Diagnoses memory-bandwidth contention from sparse access, designs software redesign, quantifies 182GB/s demand vs 130GB/s effective.
Designs mixed-precision for activation-overflow layers, quantifies FP16/INT8 compute budget vs 33ms deadline.
Analyzes memory capacity (prefill OOM) + bandwidth (generation) bottlenecks, designs full-stack with FlashAttention+quant, quantifies 204.8GB/s limit.
Analyzes AI collapse on 4MP upgrade, designs memory-aware solution, quantifies first-layer memory cost vs compute.
Disqualifies ViT quantitatively (quadratic attention), designs CNN architecture plan, quantifies 15W TDP envelope at 33.7 effective TOPS.
Analyzes MoE sparse-access pitfall, designs Roofline-based validation plan, quantifies BW efficiency crash from 102 to 10.2 GB/s.
Designs sequenced multi-stage optimization (quant+prune+fuse), quantifies each stage's latency reduction from 120ms to 29.5ms target.
Formulates hardware-aware evaluation framework with Roofline, quantifies compute/BW budget at 30W TDP for model selection.
Designs sparse MoE backbone to handle 10x compute increase on fixed hardware, quantifies AI vs Ridge Point with full math.
Analyzes FlashAttention vs speculative decoding tradeoff via Roofline, quantifies memory-bound decode at 10ms/token.
Proves 8K ViT memory-bound at 6.14 TOPS effective, designs FastFusion-CNN over DenseViT, quantifies Ridge Point.
Designs hybrid ViT/CNN approach, quantifies attention-matrix loading time (43ms) proving naive ViT infeasible.
Redesigns 8-camera late-fusion to unified early-fusion BEV, quantifies waste (400MB x 8) and utilization gains; full mastery flow.
Analyzes memory-wall for 1B LLM rationale, designs three-point plan with speculative decoding + fusion, quantifies 100ms->8ms.
Co-design problem: analyzes workload AI vs hardware, rejects peak-TOPS fallacy, quantifies 48.8ms memory-bound at 10GB/204.8GB/s.
Designs full-stack VLM edge deployment, quantifies memory-bound constraint: 6.6ms budget * 61.4 GB/s = 405MB max, eliminates 7B.
Compares two designs via Roofline, quantifies AI=500 vs AI=50 making A 5x faster despite higher FLOPs; evaluate+design+quantify.
Diagnoses PTQ dynamic-range clipping on headlight glare, designs mixed-precision, quantifies 36.5ms FP16 vs 21.8ms mixed vs 33ms budget.
Compares monolithic vs heterogeneous under 30W TDP, quantifies duty-cycle energy (17.5W idle waste), selects architecture.
Co-design analysis: quantifies Ridge Points (156 vs 1342), shows throughput crashes to 61 TOPS on Orin, picks hardware quantitatively.
Diagnoses memory-bound BEV-Transformer via Roofline, designs AI-increase fix, quantifies 48.8ms > 33ms budget precisely.
Designs ViT architectural redesign against 15x gap, quantifies 13GB data movement / 204.8 GB/s = 63ms (misses 33ms).
Designs multi-phase roadmap to hybrid architecture, quantifies 8.7x FLOP reduction from depthwise separable convs.
Diagnoses activation clipping in fog (Softmax/GELU outliers), designs mixed-precision fix, quantifies 18ms INT8 vs 943ms FP32 with full budget analysis.
Multi-stage strategy (distill/prune/FlashAttn/fuse/quant/speculative), quantifies 2.5ms inference vs 33ms budget at 40W.
Uses Roofline to prove ViT infeasible (8GB > 6.75GB physics limit at 33ms), selects Hybrid CNN with full quantification.
Diagnoses FLOPs-as-proxy fallacy via AI/Roofline, designs hybrid strategy; mostly analyze+design+quantify though napkin is brief.
Diagnoses NUMA remote-access penalty, designs memory-locality mitigation, quantifies latency doubling from 100 to 200 cycles.
Diagnoses shared-memory saturation across CPU/GPU/NPU, quantifies 76.5GB/s demand vs 68GB/s bus, redesigns pipeline.
Designs zero-copy memory architecture across heterogeneous SoC, quantifies 1ms memcpy saved per 50MB tensor across pipeline.
Designs precision strategy per model by error tolerance, quantifies 0.42ms total compute across INT8/FP16/FP32 mix vs 33ms.
Designs heterogeneous partition/schedule across CPU/GPU/DSP/NPU, quantifies transfer/compute balance in 33ms budget.
Designs asymmetric ASIL-D redundancy, quantifies 2.5% power/8% cost overhead vs 100%/60%, proves 33ms failover meets 50ms requirement.
Designs 3-channel PLd architecture with sensor diversity, quantifies stopping-distance margins (192m at 30km/h) vs 200m detection.
Designs hierarchical edge-cloud monitoring, quantifies $0.33/device/month TCO, computes storage/cellular costs.
Designs async batch remote-diagnostic system for 800ms RTT link, quantifies $2.5M/yr savings vs helicopter trips.
Designs privacy-by-design smart-home pipeline with DP/FL/SMC, quantifies 320x data reduction via on-device anonymization.
Designs multi-layer on-device monitoring/mitigation for weeks offline, quantifies 208-byte anomaly detector fitting on Orin.
Designs 3 HIPAA-compliant retraining approaches (FL/embedding/synthetic), quantifies 500MB upload, DP eps=8, 2% accuracy cost.
Classifies 4 failure modes, designs automation targeting 90% reduction, quantifies 112.5 SRE-hrs to 15 with $130K/yr ROI.
Designs resilient autonomous 5-yr device architecture with N+1/OTA/predictive maintenance, quantifies 876 failures/yr and $4.38M truck-roll cost.
Designs ASIL-D system with NN as ASIL-QM + safety wrappers, quantifies 34246-year real-driving equivalent needed; sophisticated safety design.
Designs atomic A/B OTA system with staged rollout and rollback, quantifies 8000s full vs 800s delta update time.
Designs multi-layer HW-rooted IP defense (TEE/obfuscation/watermark/attestation), quantifies 900% ROI on $2 crypto chip.
Designs DP-federated retraining system with convergence guarantees, quantifies eps composition, accuracy cost 2%, $2.50/cycle.
Analyzes V2X contention vs wired assumption, designs TDMA channel allocation, quantifies 9.4 Mbps load vs 21 Mbps effective capacity.
Designs delta update with corruption fallback, quantifies 82-85% cost savings across 10k devices including tail-case planning.
Designs two-phase scheduling across 5 models on Orin, quantifies 55ms vs 50ms deadline, iterates with INT8 optimization, projects 6th model impact.
Designs mixed-precision QAT with SmoothQuant for AR power budget, quantifies memory (630MB<1.5GB) and power (0.75W<1W).
Diagnoses PCIe bus saturation, designs zero-copy with fused preprocessing, quantifies 2.98 GB/s demand vs 3.2 GB/s bus.
Diagnoses memory fragmentation at 24M allocations/45min, designs static arena allocator, quantifies 375MB wasted to fragmentation.
Diagnoses memory-bandwidth bound 4K CNN, designs fused-layer tiling to fit 4MB SRAM, quantifies 168ms DRAM wait vs budget.
Solves energy budget with profiling: 2.25J/step, 3200 steps/day, then reveals duty-cycling requirement; iterative design with quantification.
Diagnoses silent quality degradation in compound AI, designs 3-layer observability with per-component quality metrics, quantifies $300/month cost.
Designs three-tier memory architecture (working/episodic/semantic), quantifies 62.5x compression and per-turn cost.
Evaluates three architectures, designs hybrid by tenant-size tier, quantifies 92% cost savings and recall trade-offs.
Diagnoses synchronous MLflow bottleneck, designs CQRS experiment-tracking with Kafka/ClickHouse, quantifies $16K/month savings at 100k experiments.
Backward constraint propagation across lifecycle stages, quantifies memory/throughput/cost eliminating options at each stage.
Analyzes why microservice CI/CD fails for ML, designs tiered PR/merge/release pipeline, quantifies 39x cost reduction vs naive.
Designs AI-driven live Roofline profiler + heterogeneous batching scheduler, quantifies AI=2 vs AI=500 co-location benefit.
Designs multi-LoRA serving with tier routing, quantifies PCIe swap (9.4ms) + prefill (50ms) < 200ms SLA at 5000 adapters.
Applies Little's Law for load-shedding design, quantifies queue growth 30K/s, sheds 37.5% to meet 50ms SLA at 80K QPS.
Designs 3-tier NVMe/DRAM/HBM paging for 1M context, quantifies 131GB KV cache vs 40GB HBM and PCIe transfer constraints.
Designs FlashAttention-style block tiling, quantifies O(N^2)->O(N) HBM access and 164KB SRAM fit per SM.
Designs 3-tier HBM/DRAM/NVMe LRU LoRA cache, quantifies 0.78ms PCIe transfer hidden behind 20ms compute via async streams.
Designs tiered embedding cache for 5TB DLRM, quantifies 8M IOPS capacity and 50us tail vs 50ms SLA.
Designs LoRA-multiplexed serving, quantifies 40 vs 400 GPUs (10x saving), hot/cold tiering with 5.2ms PCIe load.
Designs multi-layer fault-tolerance (spares/elastic DP/async ckpt/in-memory redundancy), quantifies 3.9% overhead vs 5% budget.
Designs multi-model serving gateway with LRU weight cache + co-location, quantifies cold start 10s, utilization math.
Designs TP=8/PP=4/DP=16 config, quantifies memory per GPU, pipeline bubble 9.375%, AllReduce times across NVLink+IB.
Designs 3-tier data pipeline (S3/NVMe/RAM) with deterministic shuffle+resumability, quantifies 10M tok/s feeding 1024 GPUs.
Designs 4-layer monitoring stack with MFU/dynamics/data, quantifies 2.2GB/day metrics and alert thresholds.
Memory budget analysis identifies KV-cache as binding constraint, quantifies 64 vs 256 concurrency, proposes INT8 KV or TP=8.
Designs 2-tier fat-tree IB topology, quantifies 12.8 TB/s bisection, hierarchical vs flat AllReduce tradeoff, $800K cost.
Designs liquid cooling + power distribution + UPS, quantifies PUE 1.118<1.15 target, 50kW/rack at 60A circuits.
Designs speculative decoding memory allocation, quantifies 2.94 tokens/round and 2.57x speedup with geometric-series math.
Designs EP=8/DP=8 MoE parallelism, quantifies all-to-all (128MB/layer 18ms) and DP gradient sync 26GB, 18% comm overhead.
Designs offline tokenization + fallback online parallel pipeline, quantifies 24 cores needed and 200MB ring buffer for backpressure.
Designs tiered APK+asset+delta delivery at 500M scale, quantifies 6.6x cost reduction ($8.5M to $1.275M) with full constraint analysis.
Designs heterogeneous AR pipeline with NPU time-slicing + priority + memory BW mgmt, quantifies bandwidth contention across models.
Designs hierarchical FL for 500M DAU, quantifies 10K sampled, 2GB/round, $200/mo CDN, battery 0.8%/round, eps=8/year.
Designs capability-aware split FL across Watch/Phone/iPad, quantifies 575x data reduction, 0.72s BLE, DP budget management.
Designs modular LoRA continual learning with security, quantifies memory 2.6MB (budget device) and adversarial perplexity defense timing.
Designs shared-backbone platform for 50 models, quantifies 44x memory reduction (1.75GB->40MB) on 3GB phone.
Designs DVFS governor + adaptive batching + thermal feedback, quantifies frequency/power curves to meet 30 FPS at minimum wattage.
Analyzes CFS+EAS scheduler challenges for heterogeneous ML, designs priority/affinity solutions, quantifies core power differences and BW contention.
Designs triple-buffer async pipeline with optical-flow interpolation, quantifies 10ms display budget vs 16.67ms at 60 FPS.
Primarily diagnoses radio energy drain in FL (not compute); napkin math thin (single 600J calc), minimal design/architecture.
Designs compression stack (top-k + error-feedback + 4-bit), quantifies 1935x reduction, battery 0.8%/day, convergence 200 rounds.
Diagnoses radio tail-timer energy drain, designs compression + sync alignment + WiFi gating, quantifies 3840J radio vs 600J compute.
Designs heterogeneous AR orchestration with zero-copy + async + DVFS, quantifies 16.67ms budget at 60 FPS and 4.5W power breakdown.
Designs operator-affinity partitioning across NPU/GPU/CPU, quantifies 19.5ms -> 17ms via handoff elimination, profiling discipline.
Diagnoses big.LITTLE sync barrier trap, quantifies 2.5x slowdown from 8 vs 4 threads; combines analysis, design and quantification.
Designs state-machine model orchestrator for 5 models on 8GB, quantifies 2.35GB weights, load latencies, 0.028% battery/query.
Designs 4-layer 3B LLM architecture, quantifies 417MB resident, 51 tok/s decode, 0.01% battery/response.
Designs multi-rate fusion across camera/mic/accel, quantifies 5.6MB footprint, 800mW, 6.25% battery/hour.
Designs speculative decoding for keyboard LLM, quantifies 20 GB/s bandwidth needs and 2W memory power requiring speculation.
Designs real-time NPU scheduling with priorities, quantifies active-params (125MB), bandwidth (2.5GB/s), cache-trash risk.
Designs priority-aware preemptible system for in-car LLM, quantifies INT4 quantization as mandatory (22 tok/s from 77GB/s bandwidth).
Diagnoses NaN-activation freeze, designs multi-layer watchdog defense-in-depth, quantifies 20ms safety margin vs VCU 100ms timeout.
Designs multi-stage PIR-to-full-model pipeline, quantifies 2W naive = 14 days vs 0.017W staged = 4.5 years.
Napkin math truncated/incomplete in content; design and common-mistake are present but quantification isn't fully exercised.
Realistic solution and napkin math are stubs (no concrete numbers shown); design@L6+ defensible but insufficient content for mastery.
Napkin math truncated at baseline memory HARD FAIL; no concrete quantification across the optimization plan shown in content.
Napkin math is a promise ('Let's prove...') with no numbers shown; design reasoning is present but quantitative content is missing.
Napkin math is a stub; actual quantification of energy budget not shown. Design+common mistake strong but not enough for mastery.
Napkin math stub ('candidate must perform this reasoning'); no concrete numerical analysis present in the content.
Napkin math stub only (says 'Let's quantify...' without the actual numbers); insufficient quantification for mastery reclassification.
Full PID/state-machine design with concrete energy (600Wh budget), power breakdown, thermal resistance math (45C/W), duty cycle P_avg=2.5W.
Designs chunked preemption scheduling, quantifies 23ms VLM chunks fitting 33ms frame budget, 18 chunks * 33ms = 594ms total.
Diagnoses SLC cache pollution from UI scrolling, quantifies 20x energy explosion (10uJ -> 200uJ per inference), proposes cache partitioning.
Designs paged weight-streaming architecture with prefetch, quantifies 488ms/token FP16 vs 60ms INT4, UFS 4.0 throughput math.
Designs custom arena/slab allocator with liveness analysis, quantifies 40us->1us per inference overhead and fragmentation elimination.
Designs mixed-precision systematic pipeline (sensitivity analysis + hardware mapping + search + runtime), quantifies KV/weights budget vs 2GB target at 30 tok/s.
